final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center
Subject: must include visual elements representing all three content pillars: new energy vehicles / digital tech / lifestyle goods
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, energetic, and friendly atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that feels vibrant yet universally harmonious across cultures — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and free of symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative connotations in any major culture or religion; must read clearly at small avatar sizes
Avoid: must avoid flags, political symbols, religious iconography, culturally specific hand gestures, and any imagery that may be offensive or taboo to specific groups
